notConnectedWarning: Not connected to Active Directory. Directory lookups will not be available. Check that this machine is domain-joined and has network access to a domain controller.

kerberosHint.logRef: See the application log for the full technical error.
kerberosHint.not_domain_joined: This workstation is not joined to an Active Directory domain.
kerberosHint.clock_skew: Workstation clock is out of sync with the domain controller (more than 5 minutes).
kerberosHint.no_credentials: No Kerberos ticket available. Sign out and back in, or run `klist purge` then `kinit`.
kerberosHint.unknown_principal: The LDAP service principal name (SPN) is unknown to Kerberos. DC hostname may be misresolved.
kerberosHint.ldap_signing: The domain controller requires LDAP signing or sealing that the current bind cannot provide.
kerberosHint.dns: DNS resolution failed. The `_ldap._tcp.<domain>` SRV record could not be resolved.
kerberosHint.network: Network connection to the domain controller failed (refused, unreachable, or timed out).
kerberosHint.tls: TLS handshake with the domain controller failed. Check certificate trust and port 636.
kerberosHint.auth_denied: Authentication was rejected by the directory (invalid credentials or insufficient access).
kerberosHint.kerberos_unknown: Kerberos authentication failed for an unrecognized reason.
kerberosHint.unknown: Connection failed for an unknown reason.
